question_type: 单选题、填空题、匹配题、多选题

content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Part 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一段关于残障人士骑马活动的广播讲话。
content.en_text: You will hear a radio talk on horse riding for disabled people.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第11至14题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 11 to 14.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至14题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 14.

content.cn_text: 本周我们的栏目是 Joan Gilbert 的一天。
content.en_text: This week our slot is A Life in the Day of Joan Gilbert.

content.cn_text: 嗯，我总是非常想在5:30开始一天，给马匹
content.en_text: Well I always have the very best intentions of starting the day at 5.30 to give the horses

content.cn_text: 好好清理马厩，但现实总会打断计划，我最终大约在6:30醒来。
content.en_text: a really good muck out, but reality intervenes and I finally wake at about 6.30.

content.cn_text: 这对你们来说可能仍然很早，但对农场工人来说，也就是我
content.en_text: That probably still sounds very early to you, but for a farm worker which is what my

content.cn_text: 儿子目前的工作来说，这已经相当赶了。
content.en_text: son is at the moment, that's cutting things pretty fine.

content.cn_text: 等我设法在大约早上7点让他顺利出门后，我才能开始把注意力
content.en_text: Once I've managed to get him safely on his way at about 7 am, I can start turning my attention

content.cn_text: 转向当天其他重要任务。
content.en_text: to the other important tasks of the day.

content.cn_text: 大约5年来，我们一直接收来自本地学院国际中心的海外学生，
content.en_text: For about 5 years we've been taking overseas students from the International Centre at

content.cn_text: 我得给她们准备一顿像样的早餐。
content.en_text: our local college and I have to give them a proper breakfast.

content.cn_text: 我们的学生过去大多来自中东，但她们现在不再来了。
content.en_text: Most of our students used to be from the Middle East, but they're no longer coming.

content.cn_text: 所以我们现在通常接待马来西亚女孩，她们喜欢吃熟食早餐，比
content.en_text: So we tend to have Malaysian girls and they like to have a cooked breakfast, much more

content.cn_text: 我们接待过的欧洲人更喜欢，包括我在内，我现在早餐什么也不吃。
content.en_text: than any Europeans we've had, including me and I don't have anything these days.

content.cn_text: 做完饭后，我终于去照顾那些可怜的马。
content.en_text: After cooking I finally get round to the poor horses.

content.cn_text: 只有在这之后，我才能开始考虑我认为最重要的任务。
content.en_text: It's only after this that I can start thinking about what I regard as my most important task.

content.cn_text: 为 Riding for the Disabled 工作。
content.en_text: Work for Riding for the Disabled.

content.cn_text: 我断断续续参与这个组织已经超过20年，但我只是最近才
content.en_text: I've been involved with this organisation on and off for over 20 years, but I've only

content.cn_text: 担任主席这一职务。
content.en_text: recently taken on the job of chairperson.

content.cn_text: 大部分工作看起来更像秘书工作，但慈善组织就是这样运转的。
content.en_text: Most of the work seems more secretarial, but that's how charities get organised.

content.cn_text: 在我们当地地区，我们曾经有多达30名骑手，但目前只有
content.en_text: In our immediate district we have had as many as 30 riders, but currently we've only
got 22.

content.cn_text: 报名做志愿助手的人数实际上是40人，但我们能指望其中25人
content.en_text: The number of helpers who have volunteered is actually 40, but we can rely on 25 to

content.cn_text: 定期来帮助不同小组。
content.en_text: come regularly to help in the different groups.

content.cn_text: 我们现在有四个独立小组，服务于年龄从6到
content.en_text: We now have four separate groups which cater for disabled children and adults from 6 to

content.cn_text: 40岁的残障儿童和成年人。
content.en_text: 40 years old.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余讲话之前，你有一些时间查看第15至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 15 to 20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第15至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 15 to 20.

content.cn_text: 正如我所说，虽然我不再有真正的全职带薪工作，
content.en_text: As I say, I feel that although I no longer have any proper full-time paid employment, I

content.cn_text: 但我的生活非常充实而忙碌。
content.en_text: do have a full and busy life.

content.cn_text: 我是家庭主妇，我并不介意，因为我并不反感做
content.en_text: I'm a housewife which I don't mind because I don't really object to doing things like

content.cn_text: 洗衣和做饭这样的事情。
content.en_text: washing and cooking.

content.cn_text: 然后还有我自己的马，我非常喜欢它们，甚至连清理
content.en_text: Then there's my own horses which I adore, even the revolting stuff like cleaning out

content.cn_text: 马厩这种讨厌的事情也喜欢。
content.en_text: the stables.

content.cn_text: 官方的 RDA 工作其实有好有坏。
content.en_text: The official RDA stuff is a mixed bag really.

content.cn_text: 我对其中涉及的所有写信和通信没有太大问题，
content.en_text: I don't have major problems with all the letter writing and correspondence which it entails,

content.cn_text: 但像许多害羞的人一样，我觉得筹款非常可怕。
content.en_text: but like lots of shy people I find the fundraising horrendous.

content.cn_text: 其他常规 RDA 职责，比如给骑手们打电话安排时间等等，是
content.en_text: Other regular RDA duties such as ringing round the riders to fix times etc is one of

content.cn_text: 这项工作中最愉快的方面之一。
content.en_text: the pleasantest aspects of the work.

content.cn_text: 毕竟，这就是我参与慈善工作的原因：与人接触。
content.en_text: After all that's why I'm involved with charity work, the contact with people.

content.cn_text: 我的工作日以所有工作中最不愉快的一项结束：整理账目。
content.en_text: My working day ends with the least enjoyable job of all sorting the accounts.

content.cn_text: 我参与 RDA 是因为我一直喜欢马，而且我能看到残障人士
content.en_text: I got involved with RDA because I've always loved horses and I can see disabled people

content.cn_text: 从中收获很多。
content.en_text: gaining so much.

content.cn_text: 我知道所有医学证据都表明，它对肌肉锻炼等方面有奇效，
content.en_text: I know all the medical evidence that shows that it does wonders for muscle building and

content.cn_text: 这很重要，但通过和骑手交谈，他们说自己获得的自信
content.en_text: so on which is important, but from talking to the riders they say it is the confidence

content.cn_text: 以及有机会成为一个全新而令人兴奋环境的一部分，
content.en_text: they gain and also the opportunity to be part of a new and exciting environment which

content.cn_text: 才是给他们带来最大好处的东西。
content.en_text: gives them the greatest benefit.

content.cn_text: 就 RDA 组织本身而言，我觉得它运作得很好，但我们一直
content.en_text: In terms of the RDA organisation itself, I feel it works very well, but we're always

content.cn_text: 努力让它变得更好。
content.en_text: striving to make it better.

content.cn_text: 比如，我希望我们各中心的助手和组织者真的能够合理化
content.en_text: I wish for example our helpers and the organisers in the various centres could really rationalise

content.cn_text: 筹款工作，因为这些工作有时非常低效；而且我也很难过，
content.en_text: the fundraising efforts which sometimes are very inefficient and it also saddens me how

content.cn_text: 有些马厩竟然不了解残障人士所面临的困难。
content.en_text: unaware some of the stables can be about the difficulties faced by people who are disabled.

content.cn_text: 无论如何，能和我们的骑手一起工作，并看到如此实实在在的益处，我感到非常荣幸。
content.en_text: Anyway, I feel very privileged to work with our riders and to see such tangible benefits.

content.cn_text: 这让我入睡时觉得，虽然这一天很辛苦，但非常值得。
content.en_text: It sends me to sleep with a feeling that though the day has been hard, it has been worthwhile.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of part 2.

content.cn_text: 现在你有45秒时间检查第二部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have 45 seconds to check your answers to part 2.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter: A, B, or C.
groups.title: Questions 11 and 12

items.title: Joan normally gets up at
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问 Joan 通常几点起床，原文说 finally wake at about 6.30，因此答案是 B。

items.title: Joan's first task of the day is to
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问 Joan 一天中的第一项任务是什么，原文先说 get him safely on his way，即安排儿子出门，对应 B “organise her son”。

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 13 and 14

items.title: In her local district, there are at present twenty-two riders and 13. ______ helpers on the volunteer list, out of whom 14. ________ come regularly.
In her local district, there are at present twenty-two riders and 13. ______ helpers on the volunteer list, out of whom 14. ________ come regularly.

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
• Joan's official title in Riding for the Disabled (RDA) is chairperson.
• In her local district, there are at present twenty-two riders and $13$ helpers on the volunteer list, out of whom $14$ come regularly.

groups.desc: Write the correct letter A, B, or C from the box, next to questions 15–18.
groups.title: Questions 15–18

items.title: Correspondence
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问 Joan 对 correspondence 的喜好程度，原文说 don’t have major problems，表示不介意，对应 B。

items.title: Fundraising
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问 Joan 对 fundraising 的喜好程度，原文说 horrendous，说明她讨厌，对应 C。

items.title: Calling riders
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 Joan 对 calling riders 的喜好程度，原文说 pleasantest aspects，说明她很喜欢，对应 A。

items.title: Organizing accounts
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 Joan 对 organizing accounts 的喜好程度，原文说 least enjoyable job，说明她讨厌，对应 C。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
Joan says the two ways the Riding for the Disabled needs to improve are by:
groups.title: Questions 19 and 20
